_instructions.faqs: Frequently asked questions. Keep answers clear and specific to the contractor niche.
_instructions.a: Answer text. Avoid marketing fluff; prefer practical details.
_instructions.category: Optional grouping label for multi-column FAQ layouts.
_instructions.variant: FAQ visual variant key. Default: accordion. Options: accordion | columns | compact.

section_subtitle: Quick answers about estimates, timelines, materials and service areas.

faqs.a: Yes. We provide free on-site estimates for most residential masonry and hardscape projects in our service area.
We serve Virginia Beach, Norfolk, Chesapeake, Suffolk and surrounding Hampton Roads communities.

faqs.q: How long does a typical patio project take?
faqs.a: Most residential patio installs take 3–7 working days depending on size, materials, site access and weather.
Yes. We are licensed in Virginia and carry general liability and workers' compensation coverage.

faqs.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.a: We accept cash, check, major credit cards and financing options on qualifying projects.
